Unable to load R3 module /usr/local/lib/virtualbox/VBoxDD.so (VBoxDD):

"_Z17vboxCmdVBVACmdCtlP8VGAStateP15VBOXCMDVBVA_CTLj" (VERR_FILE_NOT_FOUND)
